title: Cobblemon: New Age
description: Cobblemon meets QOL mods with a hint of technological advancements!
body:
# **Cobblemon: New Age**  
### *Gotta Explore 'Em All - With a Touch of Tech!*

**Cobblemon: New Age** is a carefully crafted modpack that blends the **thrill of Pokémon-style gameplay** with **vast exploration** and a **touch of technology**. Whether you're a seasoned Pokémon trainer, an adventurer seeking uncharted lands, or a tech enthusiast looking to automate your journey, this modpack has something for you!  

---

## **🌟 Key Features:**

### **🛡️ Cobblemon & Adventure Awaits!**
- **🐉 Cobblemon** – Capture, train, and battle your Pokémon companions in a fully immersive Minecraft world!  
- **🏞️ Terralith** – Explore breathtaking landscapes with completely overhauled world generation.  
- **📍 Waystones & 🎒 Travelers' Backpack** – Travel smarter with teleportation and portable inventory storage.  
- **🏰 Dungeons & Secrets** – Discover hidden treasures and challenges throughout your journey.  

---

### **⚙️ A Pinch of Technology**
- **💻 CC: Tweaked** – Bring programming into your adventure with powerful in-game computers.  
- **🪵 Iron Chests** – Expand your storage with a variety of advanced, upgradeable chests.  
- **🛠️ Crafting Tweaks** – Optimize your crafting experience with quality-of-life improvements.  

---

### **🔧 Performance & Visual Enhancements**
- **🚀 Sodium + Lithium + FerriteCore** – Get **lag-free** gameplay with cutting-edge optimization.  
- **✨ Iris Shaders & Continuity** – Enjoy **stunning graphics** with shader support and seamless connected textures.  
- **💡 LambDynamicLights & 🍂 Falling Leaves** – Immerse yourself with **realistic lighting and nature effects**.  

---

### **📜 Quality-of-Life Improvements**
- **🗺️ Xaero’s Minimap & World Map** – Navigate with ease using detailed maps.  
- **🔏 No Chat Reports** – Keep multiplayer communication safe and private.  
- **🏆 Better Advancements & 📶 Ping Display** – Track your progress and stay informed about your connection.  
- **📖 Roughly Enough Items (REI)** – Instantly view crafting recipes for all items.  

---

## **🎮 The Ultimate Survival Experience**
Whether you're **training the strongest team, conquering dungeons, exploring vast new lands, or automating your adventure**, **Cobblemon: New Age** provides a **balanced mix of Pokémon-style gameplay, survival mechanics, and technical creativity.**  

Are you ready to **craft, catch, and conquer?** Your adventure starts now! 🚀  

---
